zh-CN.name: 玉兰树
zh-CN.intro: 玉兰树开花了，白白的花瓣像小勺子，香香的。它是春天的小使者，告诉大家好天气来了。

story.title: 🌸玉兰树的小秘密
story.body: 春天到了，小区里的玉兰树冒出了好多小花苞。过了几天，花苞张开，变成一朵朵白色的花，像满树的小鸽子。小朋友奇奇每天路过都要停下来看。有一天，风吹落了一片花瓣，奇奇捡起来闻了闻，好香呀！他把花瓣带回家，放在枕头边，晚上做了一个香香的梦。梦里，玉兰树变成一位穿白裙子的姐姐，她说：“谢谢你喜欢我，春天我会开更多的花！”第二天，奇奇去看玉兰树，真的又开了好多花。他开心地笑了。

knowledge.title: 玉兰树有什么特点？
knowledge.body: 玉兰树在春天开花，花朵又大又白，香气扑鼻。它是先开花后长叶的树。玉兰花可以泡茶喝，还能做点心呢！

en.name: Magnolia Tree
en.intro: The magnolia tree blooms in spring. Its flowers are big and white, like spoons, and smell so sweet. It's a little messenger of spring.

story.title: 🌸 The Magnolia's Secret
story.body: In spring, the magnolia tree in the neighborhood grew many little buds. A few days later, the buds opened into white flowers, like little doves sitting on the branches. Every day, a child named Qiqi stopped to look at them. One windy day, a petal fell. Qiqi picked it up and smelled it—so sweet! He took it home and put it by his pillow. That night, he had a sweet dream. In the dream, the magnolia tree turned into a lady in a white dress. She said, 'Thank you for loving me. I will bloom even more in spring!' The next morning, Qiqi ran to the tree and saw even more flowers. He smiled with joy.

knowledge.title: What is special about magnolia trees?
knowledge.body: Magnolia trees bloom in early spring with large, white, fragrant flowers. They often flower before growing leaves. Some magnolia flowers can be used to make tea and snacks!
